AdGuard Base

Other:
Filter unblocking search ads and self-promotion Filters last update: | February 06, 2026 at 10:00 ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=ext&product_version=5.3.0.8&system_version=Windows+11&manifest_version=3&browser=chrome&filters=2.10&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=false&filters_last_update=2026-02-06T10%3A00%3A36)
